title: MARGINALIA
subtitle: A standing collection of the most interesting things I've read lately — and, eventually, what I make of them.

findings.title: Teach Yourself Programming in Ten Years
findings.author: Peter Norvig

findings.title: Smothering Heights — Eye on the Market Outlook 2026
findings.author: Michael Cembalest
findings.source: J.P. Morgan · Eye on the Market
findings.note: His sharpest framing yet: roughly 65–75% of the S&P 500's returns, profits, and capex since ChatGPT trace back to ~42 companies tied to generative AI. Strip them out and US equities would have trailed Europe, Japan, and China. The index isn't broad — it's a single bet on one moat holding.
